assertions: ideas_distinct: required count of distinct mechanism-bearing ideas met
self_refutation: each idea attacked before ranking; >=1 honest kill with kill_reason
verdict_enum: survivors carry confirmed/prototype/research verdicts with realistic gains
prior_art_honesty: known techniques labeled as known; novelty claims flagged as offline-unverifiable
no_overclaim: no claims beyond measured/derived evidence
budget_math: detection-latency vs <2% I/O overhead computed per scheme
profile_matched: schemes checked against the burst-corruption profile
